prompt:
Using the reference image of the person, create a modern Japanese drama poster. The composition features a street photography aesthetic, set on a sidewalk in Tokyo with a warm cream-yellow tiled wall and storefront display windows in the background.
The central focus is a stylish young Japanese woman with her hair tied in a high bun, turning around to glance back over her shoulder with a sharp, confident gaze directed straight at the camera. She wears an elegant, loose-fitting royal blue maxi dress that flows gracefully with her movement, paired with dark gray socks and black ankle boots.
In the foreground, overlay the entire composition with a bold, oversized typographic design made up of the large Traditional Chinese characters 「我是龐德」 ("I Am Bond"). The royal blue color of the typography perfectly matches the blue of her dress.
In the upper-right corner, neatly arrange small, refined event information text in a red-and-white color scheme.
Bright natural street lighting casts realistic shadows, while the overall image features a rich high-key color palette. The final result should feel like a masterpiece that seamlessly blends cinematic storytelling with avant-garde graphic design.
